description_long: This stuffed toy depicts a cute, cartoonish rabbit with a round brown body and large, fluffy cream-colored tufts on its ears, wrists, and feet. The face features large, shiny eyes, a small pink nose, and a subtle smile, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The ears are upright and oversized, each topped with a cloud-like puff, while the arms are short and positioned outward. The legs are stubby and end in similarly fluffy, cream-colored feet, and a small round tail is visible at the back. The surface appears soft and plush, typical of a cuddly toy designed for children. The overall design is simple yet charming, with smooth contours and a matte finish.
description: A plush, cartoon rabbit toy with large fluffy ears, brown body, and cream tufts on its ears, wrists, and feet. It has a friendly face with big eyes and a small pink nose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rabbit's face, large upright ears with cream tufts, outstretched arms, and fluffy feet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the ears and the roundness of the body, with one arm and the tail partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both ears, and the small round tail, with cream tufts on the feet and ears visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other arm and the profile of the head and ears.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and gentle, with large, shiny eyes, a small pink nose, and a subtle, content smile. The absence of eyebrows or exaggerated features gives it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly outstretched and both large ears raised vertically. The legs are close together, and the head is facing forward.
